plugins.name: ops
plugins.description: Business operations command center for Claude Code — 37 skills, 19 agents, smart background daemon. Manage communications (WhatsApp/Email/Slack/Telegram), projects, infrastructure (AWS), revenue (Stripe+RevenueCat), e-commerce, marketing, monitoring (Datadog/New Relic/OTEL), voice, and smart home (Homey Pro). Includes /gtm go-to-market planner, /ops:projects portfolio dashboard, /ops:ops-home control surface, and YOLO autonomous mode with 4 parallel C-suite agents.
